overview: A professional website for Master Deepak Hair Expert (Deepak Sen) — a leading Indian hair education brand. Features dark dramatic aesthetics with gold accents, services showcase, Instagram gallery, YouTube channel integration, academy courses, and appointment booking.
features: Bold brand hero with 'Cut, Color & Chemical' tagline
Services showcase — Butterfly, Wolf, Signature haircuts, Color & Chemical
YouTube channel section with 219K subscriber count
Academy courses listing with WhatsApp enrollment
Contact info with tap-to-call and WhatsApp links
Dark dramatic aesthetic — charcoal, gold, red
